message.content:
@startuml
title orderList表示

actor "配達員" as courier
participant "Courieridform.jsp" as form
participant "OrderListServlet" as servlet
participant "CourierDAO" as courierDAO
participant "Courier" as courierObj
participant "Session" as session
participant "OrderDAO" as orderDAO
participant "Order" as orderObj
participant "DetailDAO" as detailDAO
participant "Detail" as detailObj
participant "Request" as request
participant "orderedlist.jsp" as orderedlist

courier -> form: courierID入力
form -> servlet: リンク
servlet -> courierDAO: findByCourierid()
courierDAO -> courierObj: 生成
courierDAO --> servlet: Courier
servlet -> session: Courier
servlet -> orderDAO: findAll()
orderDAO -> orderObj: 生成
orderDAO -> detailDAO: findByOrderid()
detailDAO -> detailObj: リスト生成
detailDAO --> orderDAO: ArrayList<Detail>
orderDAO -> orderObj: setDetail(ArrayList<Detail>)
orderDAO --> servlet: ArrayLisr<Order>
servlet -> request: setAttribute(ArrayList<Order>)
servlet -> orderedlist: フォワード
orderedlist --> courier: 表示

@enduml
